note: Phase 1 calibration of Agent Inc. over all 30 scenarios (10 easy / 10 medium / 10 hard), gated grader (delivery gate active). Each run = 1 group x 30 tasks, max_steps 18, via HUD gateway.
target_band: HUD asks for 20-50% mean reward with variance for the trained model.

leaderboard.stats_note: mean is authoritative (HUD job, 30 tasks, 91%); std & success_rate estimated from trace sample — replace with exact terminal Results figures when available

leaderboard.role: RL target (trainable via HUD/Tinker fork) — in-band, high variance

rl_runway: Qwen base 0.327 → Qwen+RL 0.647 (+0.321) — closed ~half the gap to Claude (0.951).

pre_gate_qwen.note: 0.45 floor from offer-without-delivery inflated the mean

phase1_calibration_qwen.note: Separate Phase 1 eval run (post-gate); within normal variance (std=0.289). RL baseline 0.327 is the authoritative before-RL number — it passed the plausibility floor and is what rl_train.py compared against.
